title: Amazon.com, Inc. (AMZN) Intrinsic Value — Gemini 3.1 DCF Analysis
description: An independent discounted cash flow (DCF) intrinsic value analysis of Amazon.com, Inc. (AMZN) compiled entirely by Gemini 3.1.

assumptions.revenueGrowth: 10.0% - Driven by re-acceleration in AWS due to generative AI, and continued strength in advertising and e-commerce.
assumptions.terminalGrowthRate: 3.5% - Reflects durable competitive advantages and massive scale across global retail and cloud infrastructure.
assumptions.discountRate: 9.0% - Reflects a moderate risk profile (Beta 1.42) balanced by incredibly strong free cash flow generation and market dominance.
